themes.title: Trump’s Iran war dominates global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Right-wing media in the US, UK, France, Italy, and Spain are intensely focused on President Trump's military actions against Iran, framing it as a defining issue of his administration. The coverage highlights the economic impact, troop movements, and diplomatic tensions, with parallel reactions across these countries.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Extensive coverage of troop withdrawals from Germany, Iran war strategies, and economic impacts like rising gas prices.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Criticism of Trump's Iran policies, focus on defense trust and national security implications.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Reactions to Trump's tariffs and diplomatic tensions, with Bardella and Le Pen commenting on France's stance.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni's government discusses Italy's role in the conflict, including diplomatic efforts and economic consequences.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Coverage of Spain's diplomatic tensions with the US over Iran, including threats of troop withdrawals and economic impacts.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: Focus on Germany's diplomatic tensions with the US, including criticism of Trump's troop withdrawal threats.

themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties in Spain, France, Italy, the UK, and Norway are advancing policies that prioritize citizens over immigrants, often framing it as a response to economic and social pressures. These policies include housing, welfare, and employment restrictions targeting non-citizens.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Proposals for mass deportations, opposition to migrant regularization, and 'national priority' in housing and welfare.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Bardella and Le Pen advocate for policies prioritizing French citizens in welfare and employment.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni's government introduces housing policies favoring Italian citizens and restricting migrant access.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Farage pushes for policies prioritizing British citizens in housing, welfare, and employment.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: Listhaug advocates for stricter immigration controls and welfare prioritization for Norwegian citizens.

themes.title: Far-right surges in European polls and elections
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties in Germany, France, Sweden, the UK, and Norway are experiencing significant gains in polls and recent elections. This trend reflects growing voter dissatisfaction with mainstream parties and a shift toward nationalist and anti-immigration platforms.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: Leading in polls for upcoming state elections, with strong grassroots mobilization efforts.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Le Pen and Bardella lead in polls for the 2027 presidential election, with strong May Day rallies.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Growing influence in Swedish politics, with potential to shape government policies on migration and welfare.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Gaining ground in local elections, with Farage leading the charge against mainstream parties.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: Leading in Norwegian polls, with Listhaug positioning the party for potential government participation.

themes.title: Trump’s policies shape global right-wing agendas
themes.blurb: Right-wing parties in the US, Spain, Italy, the UK, and Poland are aligning their agendas with Trump's policies, particularly on immigration, trade, and national security. This includes adopting similar rhetoric and policy proposals to appeal to their voter bases.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's policies on tariffs, immigration, and national security are influencing global right-wing agendas.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Adopts Trump-like rhetoric on immigration and trade, including opposition to the EU-Mercosur deal.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni's government aligns with Trump on immigration and trade policies, including tariffs and national security.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Farage adopts Trump's rhetoric on immigration, trade, and national security, including opposition to solar farms.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: PiS aligns with Trump on immigration and national security, including opposition to EU policies.

themes.title: Far-right rhetoric fuels political violence
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right rhetoric in Italy, the UK, the US, Spain, and France is increasingly linked to incidents of political violence, including protests, attacks on political figures, and threats against immigrants and minorities. This trend reflects growing polarization and radicalization.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Meloni's government faces criticism for rhetoric linked to political violence, including protests and threats.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Farage and Reform UK candidates face accusations of inciting violence, including attacks on campaigners.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's rhetoric linked to political violence, including assassination attempts and threats against opponents.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Vox's rhetoric linked to political violence, including protests and threats against immigrants and minorities.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Le Pen and Bardella's rhetoric linked to political violence, including protests and threats against opponents.
